TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_abas
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: pakunkupaiku tu zana mqi byabas ya lazat a yau.
S.PHON: pakunkupaiku tu z~rana mqi βjaβas ja raz~rat a jau.
S.FORM: pakunkupaiku tu zana mqi byabas ya lazat a yau.
S.PHON: pakunkupaiku tu z~rana mqi βjaβas ja raz~rat a jau.
S.TRANSL: 我要說關於採芭樂的故事.
I'm going to tell a story about a person picking guavas.

S.FORM: wi mzaqis a lazat a yau mqibyabas nani.
S.PHON: wi mz~raqis a raz~rat a jau mqiβjaβas nani.
S.FORM: wi mzaqis a lazat a yau mqibyabas nani.
S.PHON: wi mz~raqis a raz~rat a jau mqiβjaβas nani.
S.TRANSL: The person climbed up to pick guavas.

S.FORM: uzusati qanas ni kyalaan na lazat a yau mzaqis tu byabas nani.
S.PHON: uz~rusati qanas ni kjaraan na raz~rat a jau mz~raqis tu βjaβas nani.
S.FORM: uzusati qanas ni kyalaan na lazat a yau mzaqis tu byabas nani.
S.PHON: uz~rusati qanas ni kjaraan na raz~rat a jau mz~raqis tu βjaβas nani.
S.TRANSL: 爬的那個人已經摘了兩籃芭樂.
The person who climbed up had picked two baskets of guavas.

S.FORM: mangu yau mlaziway ya mqaqaytun nani.
S.PHON: maŋu jau mraz~riwaj ja mqaqajtun nani.
S.FORM: mangu yau mlaziway ya mqaqaytun nani.
S.PHON: maŋu jau mraz~riwaj ja mqaqajtun nani.
S.TRANSL: There was a person passing by. He rode a bike.

S.FORM: wiyati isisanna ya usiq qanas.
S.PHON: wijati isisanna ja usiq qanas.
S.FORM: wiyati isisanna ya usiq qanas.
S.PHON: wijati isisanna ja usiq qanas.

S.FORM: piziannati ta qaytunanna.
S.PHON: piz~riannati ta qajtunanna.
S.FORM: piziannati ta qaytunanna.
S.PHON: piz~riannati ta qajtunanna.
S.TRANSL: He put it on the bike.

S.FORM: wiyati m RaRiw ya 'nay qaRuziqay.
S.PHON: wijati m ʁaʁiw ja ʔnaj qaʁuz~riqaj.
S.FORM: wiyati m RaRiw ya 'nay qaRuziqay.
S.PHON: wijati m ʁaʁiw ja ʔnaj qaʁuz~riqaj.

S.FORM: Raynguan na lazat a yau na wi mzaqis kmyala tu byabas a yau nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuan na raz~rat a jau na wi mz~raqis kmjara tu βjaβas a jau nani.
S.FORM: Raynguan na lazat a yau na wi mzaqis kmyala tu byabas a yau nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuan na raz~rat a jau na wi mz~raqis kmjara tu βjaβas a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個爬上去採芭樂的人不知道.

TRANSL.notes: The person that climbed up to pick guavas didn't know (this).

S.TRANSL: The person that climbed up to pick guavas didn't know .

S.FORM: mangu simqatabun kinawsa saiza ya.
S.PHON: maŋu simqataβun kinawsa saiz~ra ja.
S.FORM: mangu simqatabun kinawsa saiza ya.
S.PHON: maŋu simqataβun kinawsa saiz~ra ja.
S.TRANSL: Finally, the two collided with each other.

S.FORM: mqaqaytun.
S.PHON: mqaqajtun.
S.FORM: mqaqaytun.
S.PHON: mqaqajtun.

S.FORM: m suRawti ya yau a.
S.PHON: m suʁawti ja jau a.
S.FORM: m suRawti ya yau a.
S.PHON: m suʁawti ja jau a.

S.FORM: mqi Ruziqay tu byabas a yau tu usiq qanas nani.
S.PHON: mqi ʁuz~riqaj tu βjaβas a jau tu usiq qanas nani.
S.FORM: mqi Ruziqay tu byabas a yau tu usiq qanas nani.
S.PHON: mqi ʁuz~riqaj tu βjaβas a jau tu usiq qanas nani.
S.TRANSL: The one who stole guavas ... a basket.

S.FORM: mRusalti ya byabus a yau qaniyau Ruziqanna na lazat a yau.
S.PHON: mʁusarti ja βjaβus a jau qanijau ʁuz~riqanna na raz~rat a jau.
S.FORM: mRusalti ya byabus a yau qaniyau Ruziqanna na lazat a yau.
S.PHON: mʁusarti ja βjaβus a jau qanijau ʁuz~riqanna na raz~rat a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那個人偷的芭樂散落了.
The guavas stolen by that person were scattered.

S.FORM: sapunannati.
S.PHON: sapunannati.
S.FORM: sapunannati.
S.PHON: sapunannati.

S.FORM: tu naquni smani nani.
S.PHON: tu naquni smani nani.
S.FORM: tu naquni smani nani.
S.PHON: tu naquni smani nani.

S.FORM: iwaliwti mai tu e qaytun.
S.PHON: iwariwti mai tu ə qajtun.
S.FORM: iwaliwti mai tu e qaytun.
S.PHON: iwariwti mai tu ə qajtun.
S.TRANSL: It turned out that there was no bike.

S.FORM: maiti ya ni alaanna tu qanas a yau tu byabus a yau nani.
S.PHON: maiti ja ni araanna tu qanas a jau tu βjaβus a jau nani.
S.FORM: maiti ya ni alaanna tu qanas a yau tu byabus a yau nani.
S.PHON: maiti ja ni araanna tu qanas a jau tu βjaβus a jau nani.

S.FORM: pamengti pasasani smani nani.
S.PHON: paməŋti pasasani smani nani.
S.FORM: pamengti pasasani smani nani.
S.PHON: paməŋti pasasani smani nani.

S.FORM: tuRuzna nani yau a izau ya lazat a yau smaRuRti.
S.PHON: tuʁuz~rna nani jau a iz~rau ja raz~rat a jau smaʁuʁti.
S.FORM: tuRuzna nani yau a izau ya lazat a yau smaRuRti.
S.PHON: tuʁuz~rna nani jau a iz~rau ja raz~rat a jau smaʁuʁti.

S.FORM: ya matiw mqibyabas nizi tababaw na na paRin nani.
S.PHON: ja matiw mqiβjaβas niz~ri taβaβaw na na paʁin nani.
S.FORM: ya matiw mqibyabas nizi tababaw na na paRin nani.
S.PHON: ja matiw mqiβjaβas niz~ri taβaβaw na na paʁin nani.
S.TRANSL: He went down from the tree.

S.FORM: yauti tmayta tu qanasna na maiti tu simpez a usiq.
S.PHON: jauti tmajta tu qanasna na maiti tu simpəz~r a usiq.
S.FORM: yauti tmayta tu qanasna na maiti tu simpez a usiq.
S.PHON: jauti tmajta tu qanasna na maiti tu simpəz~r a usiq.
S.TRANSL: He looked at the basket. There was nothing.

S.FORM: e? mana maiti tu simpez a usiq ka.
S.PHON: ə? mana maiti tu simpəz~r a usiq ka.
S.FORM: e? mana maiti tu simpez a usiq ka.
S.PHON: ə? mana maiti tu simpəz~r a usiq ka.

S.FORM: zinna saiza na lazat a yau nawiz babaw mqibyabas nani.
S.PHON: z~rinna saiz~ra na raz~rat a jau nawiz~r βaβaw mqiβjaβas nani.
S.FORM: zinna saiza na lazat a yau nawiz babaw mqibyabas nani.
S.PHON: z~rinna saiz~ra na raz~rat a jau nawiz~r βaβaw mqiβjaβas nani.
S.TRANSL: 從上面採芭樂的那個人想.
The person picking guavas up the tree was thinking.

S.FORM: nayau a lanas na.
S.PHON: najau a ranas na.
S.FORM: nayau a lanas na.
S.PHON: najau a ranas na.

S.FORM: tu ma mdiyas nani unay sanpipiRasti ya lazat a yau a maw msuRaw.
S.PHON: tu ma mɮijas nani unaj sanpipiʁasti ja raz~rat a jau a maw msuʁaw.
S.FORM: tu ma mdiyas nani unay sanpipiRasti ya lazat a yau a maw msuRaw.
S.PHON: tu ma mɮijas nani unaj sanpipiʁasti ja raz~rat a jau a maw msuʁaw.

S.FORM: e m qaqaytun mala ta byabas a yau nani.
S.PHON: ə m qaqajtun mara ta βjaβas a jau nani.
S.FORM: e m qaqaytun mala ta byabas a yau nani.
S.PHON: ə m qaqajtun mara ta βjaβas a jau nani.

TRANSL.notes: (He) rode the bike and took the guavas.

S.TRANSL: rode the bike and took the guavas.

S.FORM: oh aisu haw ya mala tu qenaalaku tu byabas.
S.PHON: *h aisu haw ja mara tu qənaaraku tu βjaβas.
S.FORM: oh aisu haw ya mala tu qenaalaku tu byabas.
S.PHON: *h aisu haw ja mara tu qənaaraku tu βjaβas.

S.FORM: zinna na lazat a yau nani.
S.PHON: z~rinna na raz~rat a jau nani.
S.FORM: zinna na lazat a yau nani.
S.PHON: z~rinna na raz~rat a jau nani.

S.FORM: naRin maiti mtayta ya qenaalaanna tu niqiRuziqna tu byabas a yau.
S.PHON: naʁin maiti mtajta ja qənaaraanna tu niqiʁuz~riqna tu βjaβas a jau.
S.FORM: naRin maiti mtayta ya qenaalaanna tu niqiRuziqna tu byabas a yau.
S.PHON: naʁin maiti mtajta ja qənaaraanna tu niqiʁuz~riqna tu βjaβas a jau.

TRANSL.notes: (He) didn't see him steal the guavas.

S.TRANSL: didn't see him steal the guavas.

S.FORM: maiti mtayta ya ya qanas a yau.
S.PHON: maiti mtajta ja ja qanas a jau.
S.FORM: maiti mtayta ya ya qanas a yau.
S.PHON: maiti mtajta ja ja qanas a jau.

S.FORM: ya niqiRuziqna.
S.PHON: ja niqiʁuz~riqna.
S.FORM: ya niqiRuziqna.
S.PHON: ja niqiʁuz~riqna.

S.FORM: nayau a ya pakunkuan nayau.
S.PHON: najau a ja pakunkuan najau.
S.FORM: nayau a ya pakunkuan nayau.
S.PHON: najau a ja pakunkuan najau.
